response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and high-throughput distributed systems. While he lacks the required Python experience, his extensive background in TypeScript, microservices handling millions of requests per second, and modern DevOps makes him a very strong candidate who fits the AI-native engineering environment perfectly.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput distributed systems (handled millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby).
Extensive Staff-level and Founder experience, demonstrating strong ownership, technical strategy, and agile craftsmanship.
concerns: Lacks any mention of Python, which is explicitly listed as a must-have technical skill for the role.
Heavy reliance on niche languages like DLang for backend performance, rather than mainstream enterprise stacks.
Overlapping timelines with his founder role (GISCollective) may require clarification regarding his primary operational focus and on-call availability.
